Answer Key

On this page you will find

  1. The answers for the intrinsic value calculations using the original and modernized formula plus and

  2. A single graph that combines candlesticks, Bollinger bands and the Relative Strength Index with some hints on buy sell points.

Note that the intrinsic value answers may differ slightly from your calculations. This is due to when the data was gathered for this answer key.
